response.justification: Bogdan is a capable polyglot senior engineer with genuine distributed systems experience (millions of req/sec at Dunnhumby), but the resume shows no evidence of the core competencies this role requires: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis for growth. The position demands an IC6-level leader who has owned multi-team experimentation systems end-to-end; the candidate's history is that of a strong senior IC across full-stack and systems work, with no growth engineering or measurement platform exposure.
strengths: Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP req/sec at Dunnhumby using async I/O, caching, low-latency design)
Polyglot engineer covering C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript — aligning with the required language set
Active developer-tooling and open-source contributor with recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the core domain of this role
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/data-aptitude work visible anywhere in the resume
Resume reflects a senior IC trajectory without the cross-team systems ownership, stakeholder alignment, or staff-multiplier impact expected at Principal/IC6

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics platform background
